# MuleSoft Neo4j Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (4.0) of Neo4j Connector documentation.
> See [Neo4j Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/neo4j-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Neo4j Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Neo4j Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/neo4j-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Neo4j 4.0 Connector Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/neo4j-connector/latest/neo4j-connector-reference.md)
